journeys.label: NC / deviation / CAPA closure
journeys.focus: Containment, root cause, approval and evidence chain
journeys.highlight: Containment, root cause, approval and evidence chain

journeys.label: Equipment runtime and maintenance signal
journeys.focus: Runtime events, downtime and resource orchestration
journeys.highlight: Runtime events, downtime and resource orchestration

blockers.title: Secondary capability overlays need expansion
blockers.detail: The schema is strong, but some secondary capability overlays remain thin.
blockers.nextAction: Deepen maintenance/calibration/security overlays and publish corresponding workflow/policy metadata.

quadrants.label: Accelerate
quadrants.hint: Low blockers, ready for rapid onboarding

quadrants.label: Stabilize
quadrants.hint: Good structure but needs targeted hardening

quadrants.label: Govern
quadrants.hint: Add ownership, workflow, and policy signals

quadrants.label: Rework
quadrants.hint: Architecture or metadata posture needs redesign

releaseRadar.narrative: World-class posture is strongest in canonical breadth and journey completeness; the dominant release drag now comes from ownership/workflow governance rather than physical schema coverage.

storyboards.title: Executive release radar
storyboards.subtitle: Cross-domain readiness, hotspots and blockers
storyboards.narrative: Best view for change advisory board and architecture review.

storyboards.title: NC / deviation / CAPA closure
storyboards.subtitle: Containment, root cause, approval and evidence chain
storyboards.narrative: Containment, root cause, approval and evidence chain

personas.label: System architect
personas.focus: Compare branches, protect compatibility, steer release radar and hotspot remediation.
nextActions: Review hotspot hubs and typed-diff breaking changes on the compare canvas.
Save architecture views by domain/layer and prepare release notes with approval evidence.

personas.label: Data engineer
personas.focus: Shape indexes, relations, defaults, migration risk, and registry compiler hygiene.
nextActions: Validate destructive change firewall items and lock-sensitive alters before publish.
Compile registry bundles after relation/index changes and review drift in projection outputs.

personas.label: Manufacturing process engineer
personas.focus: Follow demand → BOM/routing → dispatch → execution → genealogy with line-ready views.
nextActions: Create focused views for line orchestration, execution evidence, and lot/serial genealogy.
Bind runtime workflow contracts for dispatch, completion, downtime, and quality containment loops.

personas.label: Quality manager
personas.focus: Control inspection, nonconformance, CAPA, training, evidence and signatures.
nextActions: Link approval and e-signature evidence to high-risk tables before broad release.
Use storyboard reviews for incoming quality, deviation closure, and controlled document readiness.

personas.label: Compliance lead
personas.focus: Enforce stewardship, approval routing, evidence packs, policy posture, and CAB escalations.
nextActions: Close owner/steward/approver gaps and attach review evidence before promotion.
Escalate destructive changes or locked-down policy changes through CAB/e-sign lanes.

personas.label: App builder / metadata admin
personas.focus: Translate canonical schema into registry fields, forms, APIs, workflows, and module packs.
nextActions: Compile registry bundles after semantic changes and validate form/API/workflow projections.
Save persona views for builder onboarding and digital-thread walkthroughs.

playbooks.title: Executive release gate
checklist: Review release radar, blocker board, and hotspot concentration.
Verify compatibility score, destructive change firewall status, and rollback narrative.
Confirm saved executive storyboard for CAB / architecture walkthrough.
Generate release notes and approval evidence bundle.
playbooks.hero: Best for weekly architecture, CAB, and release steering reviews.

playbooks.title: Migration firewall review
checklist: Inspect typed diff items by severity, approval class, and rollback complexity.
Check relation endpoints, lock-sensitive alters, and index coverage changes.
Validate registry compiler output after compare and capture migration notes.
Escalate destructive or narrowing changes through elevated/CAB lanes.
playbooks.hero: Best for schema compare, migration sequencing, and drift-safe releases.

playbooks.title: Manufacturing storyboard walkthrough
checklist: Trace planning, dispatch, execution, completion, and genealogy on one focused view.
Validate work-order workflow bindings and event/evidence capture points.
Confirm routing, operation, and resource tables remain linked to execution and quality.
Save line-centric views for planners, supervisors, and operations analysts.
playbooks.hero: Best for line execution, genealogy, and production readiness reviews.

playbooks.title: Quality / compliance gate
checklist: Review approval/e-signature posture for controlled quality and deviation tables.
Check owner, steward, approver, evidence, and reason-code completeness.
Validate inspection, NC/CAPA, training, and document chains for auditability.
Promote only after governance and evidence signals are visible in diagnostics.
playbooks.hero: Best for audit preparation, deviation closure, and eQMS governance reviews.

playbooks.title: Builder runtime onboarding
checklist: Compile registry bundle and review field/table/workflow projections.
Check table semantics, labels, widgets, and form/runtime hints for builder consumption.
Verify digital-thread links and domain saved views for builder packs.
Capture module onboarding notes and selective publish scope before promotion.
playbooks.hero: Best for turning schema semantics into runtime metadata and builder accelerators.

releaseLanes.label: Standard lane
releaseLanes.hero: Fastest governed release lane when compatibility and stewardship are already strong.

releaseLanes.label: Review board
releaseLanes.hero: Default lane for world-class hardening, requiring structured review evidence.

releaseLanes.label: Elevated governance
releaseLanes.hero: Use when governance, workflow or evidence posture still needs formal remediation.
gates: Workflow bindings or runtime contracts clarified

releaseLanes.label: CAB / e-sign
releaseLanes.hero: Mandatory for destructive changes, policy tightening, or high-risk canonical releases.

aiCopilot.title: Impact-aware release notes
aiCopilot.objective: Generate release notes grouped by domain, approval class, and runtime impact.
aiCopilot.prompt: Summarize the typed diff for Canonical ERP+MES+eQMS 7-Layer Core into release notes grouped by domain, breaking vs non-breaking, migration risk, runtime impact, and required approvals. Highlight destructive changes, blockers, and rollback evidence requirements.

aiCopilot.title: Hotspot refactor plan
aiCopilot.objective: Reduce dependency stress, missing metadata, and governance gaps on hub tables.
aiCopilot.prompt: Propose a remediation plan for hotspot table party covering metadata enrichment, workflow bindings, policy posture, relation hygiene, index hints, and saved view presets for large-canvas readability.

aiCopilot.title: Manufacturing storyboard builder
aiCopilot.objective: Create line-ready views for planners, supervisors, and traceability teams.
aiCopilot.prompt: Generate a manufacturing storyboard for journey Production dispatch → execution with focused tables, risk/workflow/canonical overlays, saved view names, and review checkpoints for planners, supervisors, and quality leads.

aiCopilot.title: Quality & policy gap closure
aiCopilot.objective: Deepen stewardship, evidence, and RLS/policy semantics for controlled tables.
aiCopilot.prompt: Inspect the current quality/compliance schema and propose missing ownership, approver roles, evidence fields, policy metadata, and workflow bindings for inspection, deviation, CAPA, document, and training tables. Include approval implications and audit narrative.

aiCopilot.title: Registry sync blueprint
aiCopilot.objective: Turn schema metadata into form/API/workflow runtime contracts with selective publish guidance.
aiCopilot.prompt: Prepare a selective-publish plan that converts this schema into registry projections, field contracts, workflow bindings, builder pack hints, digital-thread links, and documentation artifacts. Include conflict resolution rules and compile order.

aiCopilot.title: Migration firewall review prompt
aiCopilot.objective: Explain why risky changes need staged rollout, backfill, or CAB escalation.
aiCopilot.prompt: Explain the migration risk posture for this schema compare with compatibility 100%, including destructive changes, lock risk, data backfill needs, rollback complexity, and recommended rollout sequence for standard/review/elevated/CAB lanes.

suggestedLayouts.label: Layered governance view
suggestedLayouts.reason: Best for cross-layer operating model and executive walkthroughs.

suggestedLayouts.label: Domain swimlanes
suggestedLayouts.reason: Best for ownership, stewardship, and bounded-context clarity.

suggestedLayouts.label: Execution lineage
suggestedLayouts.reason: Best for demand → execution → genealogy storyboards.

suggestedLayouts.label: Workflow-centric lens
suggestedLayouts.reason: Best for runtime contracts, approvals, and event chains.

suggestedLayouts.label: Virtualized force map
suggestedLayouts.reason: Use only for exploratory topology inspection on huge graphs.

notes: Prefer saved storyboard views over raw free-pan exploration for governance reviews.
Use compact density for line/execution walkthroughs and comfortable density for compliance audits.
Keep hotspot hub tables visible with KPI chips, but collapse low-signal domains during reviews.

promotionBoard.label: Discover
promotionBoard.gate: Graph readability, domain/layer clarity, focus deck ready
promotionBoard.nextAction: Open mission control, apply persona rails, and save context views.

promotionBoard.label: Model & diff
promotionBoard.gate: Typed diff, policy intent, contract continuity
promotionBoard.nextAction: Review diff items by severity, approval class, and rollback complexity.

promotionBoard.label: Governance review
promotionBoard.nextAction: Attach review evidence and close blockers before promotion.

promotionBoard.label: Promotion
promotionBoard.gate: Lane recommendation, release radar, branch topology
promotionBoard.nextAction: Move only after compile, compare, and release-lane gates are green.

promotionBoard.label: Release
promotionBoard.gate: Firewall clear, compiler synced, rollback rehearsed
promotionBoard.nextAction: Publish through the recommended lane and capture release notes.

promotionBoard.label: Verify
promotionBoard.nextAction: Inspect command center observability tiles and update evidence timeline.

branchTopology.label: Main canonical branch
branchTopology.focus: Canonical baseline, layer/domain alignment, source-of-truth stewardship

branchTopology.label: Preview branch
branchTopology.focus: Fast compare loops, AI prompts, and saved storyboard experimentation

branchTopology.label: Release candidate
branchTopology.focus: Promotion gates, approval matrix, release notes, and runtime contract freeze

branchTopology.label: Hotfix branch
branchTopology.focus: Controlled emergency remediation with explicit rollback and CAB discipline

focusDeck.title: Executive release orbit
focusDeck.focus: Release radar, promotion stages, firewall, and branch readiness

focusDeck.title: Governance firewall board
focusDeck.focus: Approver coverage, evidence posture, destructive diff gating

focusDeck.title: party
focusDeck.focus: Dependency hotspot and metadata pressure remediation

focusDeck.title: item_revision
focusDeck.focus: Dependency hotspot and metadata pressure remediation

tiles.label: Canvas virtualization
tiles.detail: Supports huge graph readability through score-aware rendering posture.

tiles.label: Search / command indexing
tiles.detail: Keyboard-first discovery quality depends on metadata completeness and saved view hygiene.

tiles.label: Inspector laziness
tiles.detail: Inspector load posture stays healthy when hotspot hubs are controlled.

tiles.label: Registry freshness
tiles.detail: Tracks how confidently the control plane can project contracts to runtime.

notes: Prefer focus decks over free-pan exploration for large-graph executive reviews.
Use promotion board stages as the default review route for release governance.
Track firewall score alongside compatibility; both must remain visible during sign-off.

eventRail.label: Baseline secured
eventRail.detail: Canonical baseline and enterprise compiler artifacts are available for compare and rollback.

eventRail.label: Diagnostics refreshed
eventRail.detail: Health, firewall, promotion, and observability signals are regenerated from the latest schema snapshot.

eventRail.label: Promotion lane review
eventRail.detail: Recommended release lane is derived from radar, blockers, and diff governance.

environments.label: Workspace design
environments.purpose: Fast modeling, compare, saved views, and AI-assisted drafting before formal review.
environments.gate: Model clarity, typed diff preview, focus decks
environments.nextAction: Save canonical views, resolve hotspot hubs, and capture compare notes.

environments.label: Integration / registry
environments.purpose: Compile runtime projections, sync workflow bindings, and validate module-builder contracts.
environments.gate: Compiler output, registry drift, workflow contracts
environments.nextAction: Compile registry bundle and inspect API/workflow projection deltas.

environments.label: Controlled UAT
environments.purpose: Walk release evidence, promotion gates, and persona/storyboard reviews with stakeholders.
environments.nextAction: Run review playbooks, validate blockers, and lock effective window.

environments.label: Production release
environments.purpose: Governed release with firewall controls, rollback narrative, and post-release verification.
environments.gate: Firewall clear, release lane approved, rollback proof
environments.nextAction: Release only when destructive and critical diff items are fully governed.

hero.headline: Round 9 visual operating language
hero.subheadline: Professional DB table cards, readable topology and role-aware visual director controls for massive ERP/MES/eQMS schema graphs.
hero.promise: Canvas now behaves like an enterprise control plane instead of a raw ERD wall.

cardModes.label: Architect mode
cardModes.detail: PK/FK, object type, index density and schema topology stay visible while background noise collapses.

cardModes.label: Compliance mode
cardModes.detail: RLS, policies, approvals and evidence cues surface directly on the card without opening inspector first.

cardModes.label: Manufacturing mode
cardModes.detail: Traceability, execution and quality semantics become primary, helping planners and MES engineers read flows fast.

cardModes.label: Builder mode
cardModes.detail: Workflow, API and runtime binding signals are elevated for metadata admins and app builders.

edgeLenses.label: Cross-domain topology
edgeLenses.detail: Highlights cross-domain dependencies and suppresses local noise to expose architectural coupling.

edgeLenses.label: Governance lens
edgeLenses.detail: Brings approval, policy and security-relevant relations to the foreground.

edgeLenses.label: Traceability lens
edgeLenses.detail: Surfaces genealogy, lot/serial and quality lineage paths for manufacturing reviews.

edgeLenses.label: Runtime lens
edgeLenses.detail: Emphasizes workflow, API and builder-facing relationship signals.

laneGuides.label: Master data lane
laneGuides.detail: Identity-rich reference tables with heavy inbound dependency pressure.

laneGuides.label: Planning ERP lane
laneGuides.detail: Commercial, order and planning orchestration surfaces.

laneGuides.label: MES execution lane
laneGuides.detail: Dispatch, execution, shift, tool and operator tables rendered as one readable operating strip.

laneGuides.label: Traceability lane
laneGuides.detail: Lot, serial, genealogy and inventory edges stay legible under heavy density.

laneGuides.label: eQMS lane
laneGuides.detail: Deviation, CAPA, approval and evidence-heavy surfaces grouped for review boards.

laneGuides.label: Infrastructure lane
laneGuides.detail: Foundation services remain visible without overpowering domain cards.

quickActions.label: Quiet topology
quickActions.effect: Muting default edges and preserving only focus neighborhood brightness.

quickActions.label: Switch card mode
quickActions.effect: Re-weights semantic emphasis for architect, compliance, manufacturing or builder personas.

quickActions.label: Toggle lane radar
quickActions.effect: Displays dominant domain strips with table density and domain narrative.

quickActions.label: Focus edge lens
quickActions.effect: Filters topology into cross-domain, governance, traceability or runtime overlays.

quickActions.label: Accessibility review
quickActions.effect: Keeps contrast, focus and redundant semantic cues inside WCAG enterprise posture.

beautySystem.surfaceGrammar: neutral layered surfaces with domain rail and restrained semantic accents
beautySystem.motion: short, non-distracting transitions for focus, hover and selection

accessibility.contrast: Card surfaces, text and non-text cues are designed to stay at WCAG AA-friendly contrast bands.
accessibility.focus: Cards keep a visible keyboard focus ring and selected neighborhood glow.

hero.headline: Round 10 review theatre + semantic stage
hero.subheadline: Schema Studio now behaves like an enterprise review surface: themeable, scene-driven, lane-aware and selection-native for ERP/MES/eQMS architecture work.
hero.promise: Massive schema graphs stay readable because the canvas now exposes narrative, telemetry and focused review actions without flooding every table card.

themes.label: Studio theme
themes.detail: Neutral layered surfaces for day-to-day architecture and metadata editing.

themes.label: Executive theme
themes.detail: Higher-contrast lane framing and concise summaries for steering meetings and CAB reviews.

themes.label: Audit theme
themes.detail: Governance-heavy semantics, RLS posture and approval cues become the primary visual rhythm.

themes.label: Manufacturing theme
themes.detail: Traceability, genealogy and execution lineage stay dominant without overwhelming the graph.

scenes.label: Overview scene
scenes.focus: Balanced topology for broad architecture reading.
scenes.signal: domain balance, structural density, canonical spread

scenes.label: Governance scene
scenes.focus: Policies, ownership, approval and RLS posture.

scenes.label: Traceability scene
scenes.focus: Lot/serial genealogy, quality chain and equipment lineage.

scenes.label: Runtime scene
scenes.focus: Workflow, API, module and runtime binding cues.

scenes.label: Review scene
scenes.focus: Hotspots, risky objects and decision-ready summaries for release boards.

legendGroups.label: Object grammar
legendGroups.detail: Tables, views, policies, functions and runtime-facing primitives use distinct but restrained identity markers.

legendGroups.label: Relation grammar
legendGroups.detail: Structural, governance, traceability and runtime relations each retain their own stroke family.

legendGroups.label: Severity grammar
legendGroups.detail: Severity stays encoded by restrained tone, not by flooding the full card surface.

legendGroups.label: Focus grammar
legendGroups.detail: Scene focus, lane activity and selected neighborhood each have their own visual signal.

hero.headline: Round 11 presentation studio + evidence dock
hero.subheadline: Serious graph-reading surface with spotlight packs, quiet canvas, evidence dock and accessibility ops for massive ERP/MES/eQMS schema graphs.
hero.promise: Turn dense topology into a readable review experience without hiding technical truth.

spotlightPacks.label: Executive risk
spotlightPacks.detail: Surface high-risk, high-change and high-governance tables first for architecture and CAB reviews.

spotlightPacks.label: Governance matrix
spotlightPacks.detail: Pull approval, signature, change-control and evidence tables into one review plane.

spotlightPacks.label: Traceability chain
spotlightPacks.detail: Follow genealogy from item and revision through lot, serial and material consumption.

spotlightPacks.label: Runtime delivery
spotlightPacks.detail: Highlight runtime-facing execution surfaces that feed forms, APIs and workflow actions.

evidenceModes.label: Schema evidence
evidenceModes.detail: PK/FK, column surface, indexes and relation posture on the active object.

evidenceModes.label: Governance evidence
evidenceModes.detail: Owner, approver, RLS, policies, signatures and review obligations.

evidenceModes.label: Runtime evidence
evidenceModes.detail: API contract, workflow binding, module builder usage and runtime projection readiness.

evidenceModes.label: Traceability evidence
evidenceModes.detail: Lot/serial, genealogy, inspection, event and quality-chain semantics.

hero.headline: Round 12 scenario composer + precision focus system
hero.subheadline: Adaptive density, focus radius, safe dock orchestration and scenario presets for the calmest enterprise schema canvas yet.
hero.promise: Keep dense topology presentation-safe without hiding technical truth.

presets.label: Executive
presets.detail: High-signal review for CAB, executive walkthroughs and release approval boards.

presets.label: Topology
presets.detail: Balanced structural reading for cross-domain schema architecture.

presets.label: Governance
presets.detail: Approval, policy, RLS and stewardship surfaces rise to the front.

presets.label: Traceability
presets.detail: Lot, serial, genealogy and quality-loop reading for manufacturing audits.

presets.label: Runtime
presets.detail: Workflow-facing schema paths for forms, APIs and module-builder delivery.

presets.label: Calm review
presets.detail: Mute non-essential canvas noise and keep the current selection story readable.
